_description: Acceptance thresholds for the Phase 3 cluster validations. Each script under this directory reads the matching block and exits non-zero when a floor is missed.

drainer.backlog._scenario: pre-seed 100k pending rows then halt writes — measure drain rate

drainer.notify_listen._scenario: NOTIFY/LISTEN drain (v0.20+) under sustained write load

smoke.helm._scenario: helm install on a fresh kind/GKE/EKS — every pod ready inside 3 minutes, GET /v1/health 200

failover.cross_region._scenario: primary region offline; traffic served from secondary inside 60s with < 0.5% error spike

auto_routing._scenario: LLM-side AUTO classifier accuracy on retrieval_auto_routing.jsonl
